answer.content:
<html>
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <title>TimSort Simulator - Interactive</title>
  <script>
/*
  TimSort Simulator
  - Single-file interactive demonstration of TimSort core ideas.
  - Extremely minimal visual design: plain text, no colors, no animations.
  - Rich interactivity: many controls, step-by-step, auto-play, manual overrides, logging, save/load state.
*/

/*
  Data model and state. We maintain:
  - array: current array being sorted (numbers)
  - runsDetected: list of {start, len} detected
  - runStack: array of runs that have been pushed and may be merged (stack order: 0 = bottom, last = top)
  - phase: 'idle' | 'detecting' | 'insertion' | 'pushing' | 'merging' | 'finished'
  - insertionState: state for stepping through insertion sort of current run
  - mergeState: state for stepping through an ongoing merge
  - stats: counters for comparisons, copies, merges
  - history: recorded states for stepping back
  - settings: minrun, galloping enabled, gallopThreshold, autoDetectDescending, autoplayDelay
  - playback: running boolean and interval timer
  - breakpoints: options to pause when index or merge occurs
*/

(function(){
  // Utilities
  function cloneDeep(obj) {
    return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(obj));
  }
  function pad(n, width) {
    let s = String(n);
    while (s.length < width) s = ' ' + s;
    return s;
  }
  function randInt(a,b,seedObj) {
    if (seedObj && seedObj.next) return seedObj.next();
    return Math.floor(Math.random()*(b-a+1))+a;
  }
  function makeSeededRandom(seed) {
    // simple LCG
    let s = seed >>> 0;
    return {
      next: function() {
        s = (1664525*s + 1013904223) >>> 0;
        return s;
      }
    }
  }

  // Initial state
  let state = {
    array: [],
    runsDetected: [],
    runStack: [],
    phase: 'idle',
    insertionState: null,
    mergeState: null,
    stats: { comparisons: 0, copies: 0, merges: 0, steps: 0 },
    history: [],
    settings: {
      minrun: 32,
      gallop: true,
      gallopThreshold: 7,
      autoDetectDescending: true,
      autoplayDelay: 300
    },
    playback: { running: false, timer: null },
    breakpoints: { index: null, onMerge: false, onRunDetect: false }
  };

  // DOM elements
  let elements = {};

  function $(id){ return document.getElementById(id); }

  // Render functions
  function render() {
    renderArrayView();
    renderRunDetections();
    renderRunStack();
    renderStats();
    renderControlsState();
  }

  function numberWidth(arr) {
    if (!arr.length) return 2;
    let max = Math.max(...arr.map(Math.abs));
    return Math.max(2, String(max).length+1);
  }

  function renderArrayView() {
    let arr = state.array;
    let w = numberWidth(arr);
    // Represent each element as padded number; show run boundaries and current merge/insertion pointers
    let markers = new Array(arr.length).fill('   ');
    // mark runsDetected start positions with vertical bar at start
    state.runsDetected.forEach((r, idx) => {
      markers[r.start] = 'R' + pad(idx,2);
    });
    // mark runStack
    state.runStack.forEach((r, idx) => {
      markers[r.start] = 'S' + pad(idx,2);
    });
    // current merge/insertion indices
    let extraMarks = new Array(arr.length).fill(' ');
    if (state.insertionState) {
      let s = state.insertionState;
      if (s.i !== null) extraMarks[s.i] = 'i';
      if (s.j !== null) extraMarks[s.j] = 'j';
    }
    if (state.mergeState) {
      let m = state.mergeState;
      if (m.leftIdx < m.leftStart + m.leftLen) extraMarks[m.leftIdx] = '<';
      if (m.rightIdx < m.rightStart + m.rightLen) extraMarks[m.rightIdx] = '>';
      if (m.destIdx !== null) extraMarks[m.destIdx] = '*';
    }
    // Build textual rows: indices, markers, numbers, ascii bars (value represented by '#' proportional)
    let idxLine = 'idx: ';
    let markLine = 'mark: ';
    let numLine = 'val: ';
    let barLine = 'bar: ';
    let wbar = 30; // max bar width scaled
    let maxVal = arr.length ? Math.max(...arr) : 1;
    if (maxVal === 0) maxVal = 1;
    arr.forEach((v,i) => {
      idxLine += pad(i, w) + ' ';
      markLine += pad(markers[i], w) + ' ';
      numLine += pad(v, w) + ' ';
      let len = Math.round((v / maxVal) * wbar);
      if (len < 0) len = 0;
      let bar = '#'.repeat(len);
      barLine += pad(bar, Math.max(3, Math.min(wbar, w))) + ' ';
    });
    // include extraMarks row
    let extraLine = 'ptr: ';
    extraMarks.forEach(ch => { extraLine += pad(ch, w) + ' '; });
    let txt = idxLine + '\n' + markLine + '\n' + numLine + '\n' + extraLine + '\n' + barLine;
    $('arrayView').textContent = txt;
  }

  function renderRunDetections() {
    let lines = [];
    if (!state.runsDetected.length) {
      lines.push('(none detected)');
    } else {
      state.runsDetected.forEach((r, i) => {
        lines.push('Run['+i+']: start='+r.start+' len='+r.len+' ('+state.array.slice(r.start, r.start+r.len).join(',')+')');
      });
    }
    $('runsDetected').textContent = lines.join('\n');
  }

  function renderRunStack() {
    let lines = [];
    if (!state.runStack.length) {
      lines.push('(stack empty)');
    } else {
      state.runStack.forEach((r, i) => {
        lines.push('Stack['+i+']: start='+r.start+' len='+r.len+' => '+state.array.slice(r.start, r.start+r.len).join(','));
      });
    }
    $('runStack').textContent = lines.join('\n');
  }

  function renderStats() {
    $('stats').textContent = 'Phase: ' + state.phase +
      ' | comps: ' + state.stats.comparisons +
      ' copies: ' + state.stats.copies +
      ' merges: ' + state.stats.merges +
      ' steps: ' + state.stats.steps;
  }

  function renderControlsState() {
    $('minrunInput').value = state.settings.minrun;
    $('gallopCheckbox').checked = !!state.settings.gallop;
    $('gallopThresholdInput').value = state.settings.gallopThreshold;
    $('autodetectCheckbox').checked = !!state.settings.autoDetectDescending;
    $('delayInput').value = state.settings.autoplayDelay;
    $('breakIndex').value = state.breakpoints.index === null ? '' : state.breakpoints.index;
    $('breakOnMerge').checked = state.breakpoints.onMerge;
  }

  // Core TimSort logic (simplified but representative)
  function computeMinRun(n) {
    // standard TimSort minrun computation
    let r = 0;
    while (n >= 64) {
      r |= (n & 1);
      n >>= 1;
    }
    return n + r;
  }

  function detectRunsAuto() {
    // Full detection once: populate state.runsDetected
    let a = state.array;
    let n = a.length;
    let i = 0;
    let runs = [];
    while (i < n) {
      let start = i;
      i++;
      if (i === n) {
        runs.push({start, len:1});
        break;
      }
      // detect direction
      if (a[i-1] <= a[i]) {
        // ascending
        while (i < n && a[i-1] <= a[i]) i++;
        runs.push({start, len: i - start});
      } else {
        // descending
        while (i < n && a[i-1] > a[i]) i++;
        runs.push({start, len: i - start, rev: true});
      }
    }
    // reverse descending runs in-place (as TimSort does)
    runs.forEach(r => {
      if (r.rev && state.settings.autoDetectDescending) {
        reverseRange(state.array, r.start, r.start + r.len - 1);
        delete r.rev;
      }
    });
    state.runsDetected = runs;
    state.phase = 'detected';
    pushHistory('runsDetected');
    log('Detected ' + runs.length + ' runs.');
    render();
  }

  function reverseRange(arr, i, j) {
    while (i < j) {
      let t = arr[i]; arr[i] = arr[j]; arr[j] = t;
      i++; j--;
    }
  }

  // Insertion sort state machine for expanding a run to at least minrun
  function startInsertionOnRun(runIdx) {
    if (!state.runsDetected[runIdx]) { log('No such run to insert-sort'); return; }
    let r = state.runsDetected[runIdx];
    let need = state.settings.minrun;
    // If run length >= minrun or reaching end, we can stop
    state.insertionState = {
      runIdx: runIdx,
      start: r.start,
      lenTarget: Math.min(need, state.array.length - r.start),
      i: r.start + 1,
      j: null,
      key: null,
      phase: 'inner' // 'inner' during comparisons, 'copyback' when moving elements, 'done'
    };
    state.phase = 'insertion';
    pushHistory('startInsertion run ' + runIdx);
    log('Started insertion sort steps to extend run ' + runIdx + ' to length ' + state.insertionState.lenTarget);
    render();
  }

  function stepInsertion() {
    let s = state.insertionState;
    if (!s) {
      log('No insertion in progress');
      return false;
    }
    let arr = state.array;
    if (s.i >= s.start + s.lenTarget) {
      // done expanding to target
      // update runsDetected length
      let run = state.runsDetected[s.runIdx];
      run.len = Math.min(run.len, s.lenTarget); // ensure not exceeding
      run.len = Math.max(run.len, s.lenTarget); // if previously smaller, extend
      state.insertionState = null;
      state.phase = 'detected';
      pushHistory('finishInsertion');
      log('Insertion extension finished for run ' + s.runIdx);
      render();
      return false;
    }
    // if starting inner iteration, set key and j
    if (s.phase === 'inner') {
      s.key = arr[s.i];
      s.j = s.i - 1;
      s.phase = 'shifting';
      state.stats.steps++;
      pushHistory('insertion new key at ' + s.i);
      log('Insert-step: consider element at index ' + s.i + ' value ' + s.key);
      render();
      return true;
    }
    if (s.phase === 'shifting') {
      state.stats.steps++;
      // compare arr[j] > key?
      state.stats.comparisons++;
      if (s.j >= s.start && arr[s.j] > s.key) {
        // shift right
        arr[s.j+1] = arr[s.j];
        state.stats.copies++;
        s.j--;
        pushHistory('insertion shift');
        log('Shifted value from '+(s.j+1)+' to '+(s.j+2));
        render();
        return true;
      } else {
        // place key at j+1
        arr[s.j+1] = s.key;
        state.stats.copies++;
        s.i++;
        s.phase = 'inner';
        pushHistory('insertion place key');
        log('Placed key at index ' + (s.j+1));
        render();
        return true;
      }
    }
    return false;
  }

  // Run stack push
  function pushDetectedRunToStack(nextRunIdx) {
    if (!state.runsDetected[nextRunIdx]) { log('No such detected run to push'); return; }
    let r = state.runsDetected[nextRunIdx];
    // push copy
    state.runStack.push({start: r.start, len: r.len});
    log('Pushed run idx '+nextRunIdx+' to stack (start='+r.start+' len='+r.len+')');
    state.phase = 'pushed';
    pushHistory('pushRun');
    // remove from detected list (simulate consuming)
    state.runsDetected[nextRunIdx] = null;
    state.runsDetected = state.runsDetected.filter(x => x !== null);
    render();
    return true;
  }

  // Merge decision helper (TimSort invariants)
  function findMergeCandidate() {
    // Return index i where we will merge stack[i] and stack[i+1] (i is lower)
    let s = state.runStack;
    let n = s.length;
    if (n < 2) return -1;
    if (n >= 3) {
      if (s[n-3].len <= s[n-2].len + s[n-1].len) return n-3;
    }
    if (s[n-2].len <= s[n-1].len) return n-2;
    return -1;
  }

  function startMergeAtIndex(stackIdx) {
    let s = state.runStack;
    if (!s[stackIdx] || !s[stackIdx+1]) { log('Invalid merge indices'); return; }
    let left = s[stackIdx];
    let right = s[stackIdx+1];
    state.mergeState = {
      stackIdx: stackIdx,
      leftStart: left.start,
      leftLen: left.len,
      rightStart: right.start,
      rightLen: right.len,
      leftIdx: left.start,
      rightIdx: right.start,
      destIdx: 0,
      temp: [],
      phase: 'merge', // 'merge' for building temp, 'writeback' for copying to array, 'done'
      lastWinner: null,
      winnerStreak: 0
    };
    state.phase = 'merging';
    pushHistory('startMerge at stackIdx ' + stackIdx);
    log('Started merge of stack['+stackIdx+'] and stack['+ (stackIdx+1) +']');
    render();
  }

  function performGallopLeft(key, a, start, len) {
    // returns offset where key should be inserted into a[start ... start+len-1]
    // binary search style
    let lo = 0, hi = len;
    while (lo < hi) {
      let mid = (lo + hi) >> 1;
      if (a[start + mid] < key) lo = mid + 1;
      else hi = mid;
    }
    return lo;
  }
  function performGallopRight(key, a, start, len) {
    let lo = 0, hi = len;
    while (lo < hi) {
      let mid = (lo + hi) >> 1;
      if (a[start + mid] <= key) lo = mid + 1;
      else hi = mid;
    }
    return lo;
  }

  function stepMerge() {
    let m = state.mergeState;
    if (!m) {
      log('No merge in progress');
      return false;
    }
    state.stats.steps++;
    // phase: building temp
    if (m.phase === 'merge') {
      // if both sides have elements
      if (m.leftIdx < m.leftStart + m.leftLen && m.rightIdx < m.rightStart + m.rightLen) {
        // Compare
        state.stats.comparisons++;
        let leftVal = state.array[m.leftIdx];
        let rightVal = state.array[m.rightIdx];
        if (state.settings.gallop) {
          // maintain streak
          if (leftVal <= rightVal) {
            if (m.lastWinner === 'L') { m.winnerStreak++; } else { m.lastWinner = 'L'; m.winnerStreak = 1; }
          } else {
            if (m.lastWinner === 'R') { m.winnerStreak++; } else { m.lastWinner = 'R'; m.winnerStreak = 1; }
          }
          if (m.winnerStreak >= state.settings.gallopThreshold) {
            // perform gallop: copy block
            if (m.lastWinner === 'L') {
              // find how many from left consecutively are <= rightVal using gallop right
              let take = performGallopRight(rightVal, state.array, m.leftStart, (m.leftStart+m.leftLen) - m.leftIdx);
              // note: performGallopRight uses a slice but expects offsets relative; adjust
              // To keep it simple, we will search on the subarray
              let possible = 0;
              // compute binary search on left side from leftIdx to end
              let lo = m.leftIdx, hi = m.leftStart + m.leftLen;
              let count = 0;
              while (lo < hi) {
                let mid = (lo + hi) >> 1;
                if (state.array[mid] <= state.array[m.rightIdx]) lo = mid + 1;
                else hi = mid;
              }
              count = lo - m.leftIdx;
              if (count <= 0) count = 1;
              // copy chunk
              for (let k=0;k<count;k++) { m.temp.push(state.array[m.leftIdx++]); state.stats.copies++; }
              log('Gallop copied '+count+' from left');
              pushHistory('gallop-left copy '+count);
              render();
              return true;
            } else {
              // gallop right: copy block from right while <= leftVal?
              let lo = m.rightIdx, hi = m.rightStart + m.rightLen;
              let cnt = 0;
              while (lo < hi) {
                let mid = (lo + hi) >> 1;
                if (state.array[mid] < state.array[m.leftIdx]) lo = mid + 1;
                else hi = mid;
              }
              cnt = lo - m.rightIdx;
              if (cnt <= 0) cnt = 1;
              for (let k=0;k<cnt;k++) { m.temp.push(state.array[m.rightIdx++]); state.stats.copies++; }
              log('Gallop copied '+cnt+' from right');
              pushHistory('gallop-right copy '+cnt);
              render();
              return true;
            }
          }
        }
        // normal single-step compare
        if (leftVal <= rightVal) {
          m.temp.push(leftVal);
          m.leftIdx++;
          state.stats.copies++;
          m.lastWinner = 'L';
        } else {
          m.temp.push(rightVal);
          m.rightIdx++;
          state.stats.copies++;
          m.lastWinner = 'R';
        }
        pushHistory('merge-compare-copy');
        render();
        return true;
      } else if (m.leftIdx < m.leftStart + m.leftLen) {
        // copy remainder of left
        m.temp.push(state.array[m.leftIdx++]);
        state.stats.copies++;
        pushHistory('merge-copy-left');
        render();
        return true;
      } else if (m.rightIdx < m.rightStart + m.rightLen) {
        m.temp.push(state.array[m.rightIdx++]);
        state.stats.copies++;
        pushHistory('merge-copy-right');
        render();
        return true;
      } else {
        // finished building temp, move to writeback
        m.phase = 'writeback';
        m.destIdx = m.leftStart;
        pushHistory('merge-build-finished');
        log('Merge build finished; writing back '+m.temp.length+' items to array');
        render();
        return true;
      }
    } else if (m.phase === 'writeback') {
      if (m.destIdx < m.leftStart + m.temp.length) {
        let val = m.temp[m.destIdx - m.leftStart];
        state.array[m.destIdx] = val;
        state.stats.copies++;
        m.destIdx++;
        pushHistory('merge-writeback');
        render();
        return true;
      } else {
        // finalize merge: replace two runs in stack with merged run
        let sidx = m.stackIdx;
        let newLen = m.leftLen + m.rightLen;
        let newStart = m.leftStart;
        // replace stack entries sidx and sidx+1 with merged
        state.runStack.splice(sidx, 2, {start: newStart, len: newLen});
        state.stats.merges++;
        state.mergeState = null;
        state.phase = 'detected';
        pushHistory('merge-finish');
        log('Merge finished; stack index '+sidx+' now has start='+newStart+' len='+newLen);
        render();
        return false;
      }
    }
    return false;
  }

  // History for undo
  function pushHistory(action) {
    // store a snapshot of relevant parts
    let snap = {
      array: cloneDeep(state.array),
      runsDetected: cloneDeep(state.runsDetected),
      runStack: cloneDeep(state.runStack),
      phase: state.phase,
      insertionState: cloneDeep(state.insertionState),
      mergeState: cloneDeep(state.mergeState),
      stats: cloneDeep(state.stats),
      action: action,
      settings: cloneDeep(state.settings)
    };
    state.history.push(snap);
    if (state.history.length > 200) state.history.shift();
  }

  function undoStep() {
    if (state.history.length <= 1) { log('No earlier state to undo'); return; }
    // pop current, revert to previous
    state.history.pop();
    let prev = state.history[state.history.length - 1];
    state.array = cloneDeep(prev.array);
    state.runsDetected = cloneDeep(prev.runsDetected);
    state.runStack = cloneDeep(prev.runStack);
    state.phase = prev.phase;
    state.insertionState = cloneDeep(prev.insertionState);
    state.mergeState = cloneDeep(prev.mergeState);
    state.stats = cloneDeep(prev.stats);
    log('Undid last action: now at action "'+prev.action+'"');
    render();
  }

  // Playback control
  function startPlayback() {
    if (state.playback.running) return;
    state.playback.running = true;
    log('Autoplay started');
    function tick() {
      // one step of high-level algorithm: prefer finishing any ongoing insertion or merge before detecting/pushing
      if (state.insertionState) { stepInsertion(); }
      else if (state.mergeState) { stepMerge(); }
      else {
        // if detected runs remain, push next run then check merges
        if (state.runsDetected && state.runsDetected.length) {
          // decide to insertion-extend smallest for minrun if needed
          let nextIdx = 0;
          // if next run is shorter than minrun, start insertion on it
          if (state.runsDetected[nextIdx].len < state.settings.minrun) {
            startInsertionOnRun(nextIdx);
          } else {
            pushDetectedRunToStack(nextIdx);
          }
        } else {
          // no detected runs: check for merge candidates
          let cand = findMergeCandidate();
          if (cand >= 0) {
            startMergeAtIndex(cand);
          } else {
            if (state.runStack.length > 1) {
              // if no candidate and >1 runs, merge top two
              startMergeAtIndex(state.runStack.length - 2);
            } else {
              // sorted
              state.phase = 'finished';
              log('Sorting finished (playback)');
              stopPlayback();
            }
          }
        }
      }
      render();
      // breakpoints
      if (state.breakpoints.index !== null) {
        let b = Number(state.breakpoints.index);
        if (state.array[b] !== undefined && state.array[b] !== null) {
          // simple pause if value equals some condition? We will pause when we perform writeback to index b
        }
      }
    }
    state.playback.timer = setInterval(tick, state.settings.autoplayDelay);
  }

  function stopPlayback() {
    if (!state.playback.running) return;
    clearInterval(state.playback.timer);
    state.playback.timer = null;
    state.playback.running = false;
    log('Autoplay stopped');
  }

  // Logging
  function log(msg) {
    let now = new Date().toLocaleTimeString();
    $('log').value = now + ' - ' + msg + '\n' + $('log').value;
  }

  function clearLog() { $('log').value = ''; }

  // UI action handlers
  function randomizeArray() {
    let size = Number($('sizeInput').value) || 20;
    let min = Number($('minVal').value) || 0;
    let max = Number($('maxVal').value) || 100;
    let seed = $('seedInput').value;
    let seedObj = null;
    if (seed !== '') {
      seedObj = makeSeededRandom(Number(seed));
    }
    let arr = [];
    for (let i=0;i<size;i++) arr.push(randInt(min,max,seedObj) % (max+1));
    state.array = arr;
    state.runsDetected = [];
    state.runStack = [];
    state.insertionState = null;
    state.mergeState = null;
    state.phase = 'idle';
    state.stats = {comparisons:0,copies:0,merges:0,steps:0};
    state.history = [];
    pushHistory('randomize');
    log('Array randomized, size='+size+' min='+min+' max='+max+' seed='+(seed||'none'));
    render();
  }

  function loadCustomArray() {
    let text = $('customArray').value.trim();
    if (!text) { log('Custom array empty'); return; }
    // parse numbers separated by commas or spaces
    let parts = text.split(/[\s,]+/).filter(s => s.length);
    let arr = parts.map(s => Number(s));
    if (arr.some(x => isNaN(x))) { log('Custom array contains non-numeric values'); return; }
    state.array = arr;
    state.runsDetected = [];
    state.runStack = [];
    state.insertionState = null;
    state.mergeState = null;
    state.phase = 'idle';
    state.stats = {comparisons:0,copies:0,merges:0,steps:0};
    state.history = [];
    pushHistory('loadCustom');
    log('Custom array loaded, length='+arr.length);
    render();
  }

  function detectRunsButton() {
    if (!state.array.length) { log('No array to detect runs'); return; }
    detectRunsAuto();
    pushHistory('detectRuns');
    render();
  }

  function computeMinRunButton() {
    let n = state.array.length;
    let m = computeMinRun(n);
    state.settings.minrun = m;
    $('minrunInput').value = m;
    state.settings.minrun = Math.max(1, Math.min(m, n));
    log('Computed minrun for n='+n+' is '+m);
    render();
  }

  function setMinRunManual() {
    let v = Number($('minrunInput').value);
    if (!v || v < 1) { log('Invalid minrun'); return; }
    state.settings.minrun = Math.max(1, Math.min(v, state.array.length));
    log('Minrun set to '+state.settings.minrun);
    pushHistory('setMinrun');
    render();
  }

  function startInsertionManual() {
    let idx = Number($('runToInsert').value);
    if (isNaN(idx)) { log('Invalid run index'); return; }
    startInsertionOnRun(idx);
  }

  function stepInsertionManual() {
    if (!state.insertionState) { log('No insertion in progress'); return; }
    stepInsertion();
  }

  function pushNextDetected() {
    if (!state.runsDetected.length) { log('No detected runs to push'); return; }
    pushDetectedRunToStack(0);
  }

  function findAndStartMerge() {
    let c = findMergeCandidate();
    if (c >= 0) startMergeAtIndex(c);
    else log('No merge candidate found by invariants; you may force merge manually.');
  }

  function stepMergeManual() {
    if (!state.mergeState) { log('No merge in progress'); return; }
    stepMerge();
  }

  function manualMergeNow() {
    let idx = Number($('manualMergeIdx').value);
    if (isNaN(idx)) { log('Invalid manual merge index'); return; }
    if (idx < 0 || idx >= state.runStack.length-1) { log('Manual merge index out of range'); return; }
    startMergeAtIndex(idx);
  }

  function undoButton() { undoStep(); }

  function resetAll() {
    state.array = [];
    state.runsDetected = [];
    state.runStack = [];
    state.insertionState = null;
    state.mergeState = null;
    state.phase = 'idle';
    state.stats = {comparisons:0,copies:0,merges:0,steps:0};
    state.history = [];
    state.playback.running = false;
    if (state.playback.timer) clearInterval(state.playback.timer);
    state.playback.timer = null;
    log('Reset simulator');
    render();
  }

  function saveStateToJSON() {
    let s = {
      array: state.array,
      runsDetected: state.runsDetected,
      runStack: state.runStack,
      stats: state.stats,
      settings: state.settings
    };
    $('stateJSON').value = JSON.stringify(s, null, 2);
    log('State exported to JSON');
  }

  function loadStateFromJSON() {
    try {
      let s = JSON.parse($('stateJSON').value);
      if (!s.array) { log('Invalid JSON state'); return; }
      state.array = s.array;
      state.runsDetected = s.runsDetected || [];
      state.runStack = s.runStack || [];
      state.stats = s.stats || {comparisons:0,copies:0,merges:0,steps:0};
      state.settings = s.settings || state.settings;
      state.insertionState = null;
      state.mergeState = null;
      state.phase = 'idle';
      state.history = [];
      pushHistory('loadState');
      log('State loaded from JSON');
      render();
    } catch (e) {
      log('Failed to parse JSON: ' + e.message);
    }
  }

  function toggleAutoplay() {
    if (state.playback.running) stopPlayback();
    else startPlayback();
    render();
  }

  function setGallopSetting() {
    state.settings.gallop = $('gallopCheckbox').checked;
    state.settings.gallopThreshold = Number($('gallopThresholdInput').value) || state.settings.gallopThreshold;
    state.settings.autoplayDelay = Number($('delayInput').value) || state.settings.autoplayDelay;
    state.settings.autoDetectDescending = $('autodetectCheckbox').checked;
    pushHistory('setSettings');
    render();
    log('Settings updated');
  }

  function setBreakpoints() {
    let v = $('breakIndex').value.trim();
    state.breakpoints.index = v === '' ? null : Number(v);
    state.breakpoints.onMerge = $('breakOnMerge').checked;
    log('Breakpoints updated');
    render();
  }

  // Initialization and event wiring
  function init() {
    // wire events
    $('randomBtn').addEventListener('click', randomizeArray);
    $('loadCustomBtn').addEventListener('click', loadCustomArray);
    $('detectRunsBtn').addEventListener('click', detectRunsButton);
    $('computeMinrunBtn').addEventListener('click', computeMinRunButton);
    $('setMinrunBtn').addEventListener('click', setMinRunManual);
    $('startInsertionBtn').addEventListener('click', startInsertionManual);
    $('stepInsertionBtn').addEventListener('click', stepInsertionManual);
    $('pushNextRunBtn').addEventListener('click', pushNextDetected);
    $('findMergeBtn').addEventListener('click', findAndStartMerge);
    $('stepMergeBtn').addEventListener('click', stepMergeManual);
    $('manualMergeBtn').addEventListener('click', manualMergeNow);
    $('undoBtn').addEventListener('click', undoButton);
    $('resetBtn').addEventListener('click', resetAll);
    $('saveStateBtn').addEventListener('click', saveStateToJSON);
    $('loadStateBtn').addEventListener('click', loadStateFromJSON);
    $('playPauseBtn').addEventListener('click', toggleAutoplay);
    $('applySettingsBtn').addEventListener('click', setGallopSetting);
    $('setBreakBtn').addEventListener('click', setBreakpoints);
    $('clearLogBtn').addEventListener('click', clearLog);
    // initial render
    render();
  }

  window.addEventListener('load', init);
  // expose some for debugging
  window.timsim = {
    state: state,
    render: render,
    stepMerge: stepMerge,
    stepInsertion: stepInsertion,
    pushHistory: pushHistory
  };
})();
  </script>
</head>
<body>
  <h1>TimSort Simulator</h1>
  <p>Plain interactive TimSort demonstration. Controls are intentionally basic. Use the controls to explore run detection, insertion-sort extension, and merges (including optional galloping).</p>

  <fieldset>
    <legend>Array controls</legend>
    Size: <input id="sizeInput" type="number" value="20" min="1" />  
    Min value: <input id="minVal" type="number" value="0" />  
    Max value: <input id="maxVal" type="number" value="100" />  
    Seed (optional): <input id="seedInput" type="text" value="" />  
    <button id="randomBtn">Randomize</button>
    <button id="resetBtn">Reset</button>
    <br><br>
    Custom array (comma or space separated):<br>
    <textarea id="customArray" rows="3" cols="80"></textarea><br>
    <button id="loadCustomBtn">Load Custom Array</button>
  </fieldset>

  <fieldset>
    <legend>Run detection & minrun</legend>
    <button id="detectRunsBtn">Detect Runs</button>
    Compute minrun for current n: <button id="computeMinrunBtn">Compute</button>
    Minrun: <input id="minrunInput" type="number" value="32" style="width:60px" />
    <button id="setMinrunBtn">Set Minrun</button>
    <br><br>
    <label><input id="autodetectCheckbox" type="checkbox" /> Auto-reverse descending runs</label>
  </fieldset>

  <fieldset>
    <legend>Insertion extension (step-by-step)</legend>
    Run index to extend: <input id="runToInsert" type="number" value="0" style="width:60px" />
    <button id="startInsertionBtn">Start Insertion on Run</button>
    <button id="stepInsertionBtn">Step Insertion</button>
  </fieldset>

  <fieldset>
    <legend>Stack & Merge controls</legend>
    <button id="pushNextRunBtn">Push Next Detected Run to Stack</button>
    <button id="findMergeBtn">Find Merge Candidate (by invariants)</button>
    <button id="stepMergeBtn">Step Current Merge</button>
    Manual merge stack index: <input id="manualMergeIdx" type="number" value="0" style="width:60px" />
    <button id="manualMergeBtn">Force Merge Now</button>
    <br><br>
    <button id="playPauseBtn">Play/Pause Autoplay</button>
    <label>Autoplay delay ms: <input id="delayInput" type="number" value="300" style="width:80px" /></label>
  </fieldset>

  <fieldset>
    <legend>Galloping & advanced settings</legend>
    <label><input id="gallopCheckbox" type="checkbox" checked /> Enable Galloping</label>
    Threshold: <input id="gallopThresholdInput" type="number" value="7" style="width:60px" />
    <button id="applySettingsBtn">Apply Settings</button>
  </fieldset>

  <fieldset>
    <legend>Breakpoints / Debug</legend>
    Pause when index: <input id="breakIndex" type="text" style="width:80px" />
    <label><input id="breakOnMerge" type="checkbox" /> Pause on merge start</label>
    <button id="setBreakBtn">Set Breakpoints</button>
  </fieldset>

  <fieldset>
    <legend>State save / load</legend>
    <button id="saveStateBtn">Export State JSON</button>
    <button id="loadStateBtn">Load State JSON</button><br>
    <textarea id="stateJSON" rows="6" cols="80"></textarea>
  </fieldset>

  <fieldset>
    <legend>Undo / Log</legend>
    <button id="undoBtn">Undo Last Step</button>
    <button id="clearLogBtn">Clear Log</button>
    <br><br>
    <textarea id="log" rows="6" cols="80" readonly></textarea>
  </fieldset>

  <h3>Array View</h3>
  <pre id="arrayView" style="white-space:pre-wrap;"></pre>

  <h3>Detected Runs</h3>
  <pre id="runsDetected"></pre>

  <h3>Run Stack</h3>
  <pre id="runStack"></pre>

  <h3>Stats</h3>
  <pre id="stats"></pre>

  <script>
    // Small note for users about possible exploration paths:
    (function(){
      let t = document.createElement('div');
      t.textContent = 'Usage suggestions: Generate an array -> Detect Runs -> Use insertion steps to extend short runs -> Push runs to stack -> Use "Find Merge" to let TimSort choose merges or manually merge -> Step through merges to see comparisons/copies -> Toggle galloping to observe chunk copies.';
      document.body.insertBefore(t, document.getElementById('arrayView'));
    })();
  </script>

</body>
</html>

messages.content:
Generate a single, self-contained HTML file with embedded CSS and JavaScript that demonstrates the concept Tim Sort with MAXIMUM interactivity and rich user control. Focus on:

- Multiple interactive controls (buttons, sliders, input fields)
- Complex state transitions and user-driven workflows
- Deep exploration capabilities with many possible interaction paths
- Rich functionality as the PRIMARY goal

IMPORTANT: Keep visual design EXTREMELY MINIMAL and BASIC - use simple black text on white background, basic HTML elements with no styling, no colors, no animations. The interface should be functional but visually plain and unpolished. Prioritize interactive richness over visual appeal.

Only respond with the complete HTML file.
